name: Café Kaila
tagline: Four-time Honolulu Magazine gold medalist for Best Breakfast — the meatloaf loco moco is a hangover cure and a life choice all at once.
mustOrder: Meatloaf loco moco — housemade meatloaf with rich gravy, the signature dish
Macadamia nut pancakes — fluffy with local mac nuts and tropical fruit
Eggs Benedict — perfectly poached with hollandaise on point
parking: Upper level of Market City Shopping Center
talkStory: Opened in 2008 by Chef Christi Kaila Sei in Market City Shopping Center, quickly winning Honolulu Magazine's Best Breakfast award four times and becoming a local institution.
insiderTips: Weekday mornings are way less crowded than weekends. Get there by 7:30am on Saturdays or expect a 30+ minute wait. The daily specials board is always worth checking.
